creator: ponomarenko@i-jetcom.ru
text:
On system i386 it has been defined 2GB memories. After 4 days messages have got out (much) that has led to system lag.

kernel: lla_lookup: new lle malloc failed
kernel: arpresolve: cannot allocate llinfo for ip

Now costs amd64, but 

vmstat-m | grep lltable
      lltable 2458913 614733K - 2458915 256,512
vmstat-m | grep lltable
      lltable 2458930 614737K - 2458932 256,512
vmstat-m | grep lltable
      lltable 2458949 614742K - 2458951 256,512
vmstat-m | grep lltable
      lltable 2458960 614745K - 2458962 256,512

Fix: 

I don't no
How-To-Repeat: After each reboot the systems everyone of 4 days (on i386).
